nasb.text: Ahimaaz called and said to the king, “All is well.” And he prostrated himself before the king with his face to the ground. And he said, “Blessed is the Lord your God, who has delivered up the men who lifted their hands against my lord the king.”

esv.text: Then Ahimaaz cried out to the king, “All is well.” And he bowed before the king with his face to the earth and said, “Blessed be the Lord your God, who has delivered up the men who raised their hand against my lord the king.”

cnv.text: 亞希瑪斯向王呼叫，說：“平安！”就臉伏於地，叩拜王，說：“耶和華你的　神是應當稱頌的，因為他已經把舉手攻擊我主我王的人交給你了！”

ccb.text: 亚希玛斯高声对王说：“一切都好！”他在王面前俯伏叩拜，说：“你的上帝耶和华当受称颂，祂已经消灭了那些攻击我主我王的敌人。”
